root.rep_text: รายงานแสดงการกู้ตามวัตถุประสงค์ ตามประเภทเงินกู้
root.sql: SELECT sc_lon_m_rule.loan_type, sc_lon_m_rule.loan_type_description, sc_lon_m_ucf_loan_obj.loan_objective_description, sc_lon_m_ucf_loan_obj.loan_objective_code, sc_lon_m_rule.account_id, count(sc_lon_m_contract.loan_contract_no) as count_conno, sum( sc_lon_m_contract.loan_approve_amount ) as loan_approve_amount, --ยอดอนุมัติ sum( sc_lon_m_contract.real_recieve ) as real_receive --จำนวนรับจริง FROM sc_lon_m_contract, sc_lon_m_loan_card, sc_lon_m_loan_request, sc_lon_m_ucf_loan_obj, sc_lon_m_rule WHERE ( sc_lon_m_contract.loan_contract_no = sc_lon_m_loan_card.loan_contract_no ) and ( sc_lon_m_contract.loan_requestment_no = sc_lon_m_loan_request.loan_requestment_no ) and ( sc_lon_m_loan_request.loan_type = sc_lon_m_ucf_loan_obj.loan_type ) and ( sc_lon_m_loan_request.loan_objective_code = sc_lon_m_ucf_loan_obj.loan_objective_code ) and ( sc_lon_m_rule.loan_type = sc_lon_m_contract.loan_type ) and sc_lon_m_rule.invest_status = '0' /*WHERE*/ --and to_number(to_char( sc_lon_m_contract.begining_of_contract ,'yyyy')) = '!year_1!' --and to_number(to_char( sc_lon_m_contract.begining_of_contract ,'mm')) = '!month_1!' GROUP BY sc_lon_m_rule.loan_type, sc_lon_m_rule.loan_type_description, sc_lon_m_ucf_loan_obj.loan_objective_code, sc_lon_m_ucf_loan_obj.loan_objective_description, sc_lon_m_rule.account_id ORDER BY sc_lon_m_rule.loan_type asc, sc_lon_m_rule.loan_type_description asc, sc_lon_m_ucf_loan_obj.loan_objective_code asc, sc_lon_m_ucf_loan_obj.loan_objective_description asc
